html_excerpt:
Main ContentFooterAccessibility Statement
  • How the Pod works
  • Accessories
  • Reviews
Shop the Pod

Designed for deep sleep. Personalized to you.

Discover the Pod

  • Try risk-free for 30 nights

    Enjoy the Pod at home, and return it for a full refund if you don’t love it

  • Free shipping & returns

    Free shipping in 30+ countries with no-cost, hassle-free returns

  • Worry-free warranty

    Ongoing Pod protection for up to 5 years. Warranty terms apply**

A sleep system designed for deeper recovery, on any bed

From the Cover that adapts to your body, to the Blanket and Pillow Cover that extend comfort head-to-toe, to the Base that elevates you for zero-gravity rest — the Pod transforms every layer of your sleep.

Fully immersive cooling and heating comfort ranging from 12° to 43°C, and adapting in real time to keep you and your partner in deep sleep longer

Elevation through an intelligent adjustable Base that relieves back pressure and automatically reduces snoring, all while you sleep

Integrated surround-sound built into the Base helps you unwind, drown out background noise, and stabilize your sleep environment all night

Whatever your sleep challenge, the Pod meets you there

The Pod expertly adapts to every type of sleeper, creating the perfect conditions for optimal rest.

Couples

Sleep in perfect harmony

Dual-zone technology keeps each partner at their ideal temperature, ending thermostat battles and helping you both rest better together.

Menopausal Women

Relief from hot flashes, every night

The Pod keeps your side of the bed cool all night to help prevent overheating. If a hot flash wakes you, you can hit a button to cool down fast, then it slowly returns to your normal sleep temperature.

Wellness Seekers

Optimize every night

Continuous monitoring of heart rate, HRV, and temperature gives you actionable insights to optimize recovery, focus, and longevity.

Hot Sleepers

Finally sleep through the heat

If you overheat at night, the Pod cools your side of the bed before it even happens. It keeps your temperature steady so you stay asleep instead of flipping your pillow or kicking off the covers.

Everyday Athletes

Recover after training

Your muscles recover while you sleep. The Pod cools your body to reduce strain and tracks things like heart rate and how deeply you sleep, so you wake up actually recovered, not just rested.

Snorers

Less snoring, more sleep

The Pod gently lifts your upper body when snoring is detected, which can help keep your airway open. No elbows, no waking each other up.

The best sleep you've ever had

The Pod is clinically proven to deliver real results for your sleep, every night

Less time to fall asleep

Up to 44%

More deep sleep

Up to 34%

Reduction in snoring

Up to 45%

Fewer night wake ups

Up to 23%

Driven by ambition. Validated by science.

We're radically committed to sleep fitness, grounded in science, fueled by data, and supported by over 50 clinical studies. Our goal is optimal rest for peak health and performance. Because sleep is your edge.

Why Eight Sleep - learn how our technology improves your sleep

Real people.
Real results.

How the Pod helps people sleep deeper, feel better, and get more out of every day

Uday

"Within 3 weeks I started to have big improvements in REM and deep sleep"

Kate

"It really helped during pregnancy to tune to the exact temperature"

Austin & Brianna

"I can be comfortable on my cool side of the bed and she can have her warm side"

Marni

"The Pod has been a huge asset to my work, my training, and my performance"

Hashem

"It’s helped so much to not wake up drenched in sleep or freezing"

Lydia

"I no longer consistently wake up in the middle of night and stay asleep longer"

Martin

"With the Pod, it’s a very comfortable sleep through the night"

Thousands of trusted reviews
from extraordinary people like you

View more reviews

"I was a hot sleeper that'd wake up 2-3 times a night, so yes one of the best investments I ever made. Basically eliminates temperature-based wakeups."

Jason
Aug 2024

"Biggest difference for me is how I feel...I'm a hot sleeper & it has changed how i feel and limits middle of the night waking up bc of it"

Jillian
Aug 2024

"Personally, I’m too hot of a sleeper to sleep without it. I try to plan not to travel to avoid the poor sleep…It’s one of those life upgrades that you didn’t know you needed until you had it"

Chase
Nov 2024

"Had one for over 3 years. Yes - amazing especially if one partner runs hot, the other cold. recently upgraded - you can now tap the side of the cover to adjust temp up or down without an app. It's a game changer especially when your legs are hot from a hard workout."

Martin
Feb 2025

"Add an @eightsleep to keep the bed just right during hot summer and cold winter nights. Game changer."

Rowan
